segments.text: This is what the Lord says:

Where is your mother's certificate of divorce with which I sent her away? Or to which of my creditors did I sell you? Because of your sins you were sold; because of your transgressions your mother was sent away.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: When I came, why was there no one? When I called, why was there no one to answer? Was my arm too short to deliver you? Do I lack the strength to rescue you? By a mere rebuke I dry up the sea, I turn rivers into a desert; their fish rot for lack of water and die of thirst.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: I clothe the heavens with darkness and make sackcloth its covering.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The Sovereign Lord has given me a well-instructed tongue, to know the word that sustains the weary. He wakens me morning by morning, wakens my ear to listen like one being instructed.
The Sovereign Lord has opened my ears; I have not been rebellious, I have not turned away.
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: I offered my back to those who beat me, my cheeks to those who pulled out my beard; I did not hide my face from mocking and spitting.
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: Because the Sovereign Lord helps me, I will not be disgraced. Therefore have I set my face like flint, and I know I will not be put to shame.
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: He who vindicates me is near. Who then will bring charges against me? Let us face each other! Who is my accuser? Let him confront me!
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: It is the Sovereign Lord who helps me. Who will condemn me? They will all wear out like a garment; the moths will eat them up.
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: Who among you fears the Lord and obeys the word of his servant? Let the one who walks in the dark, who has no light, trust in the name of the Lord and rely on their God.
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: But now, all you who light fires and provide yourselves with flaming torches, go, walk in the light of your fires and of the torches you have set ablaze. This is what you shall receive from my hand: You will lie down in torment.
segments.speaker: The Lord
